homepage.title: Gregor Poynton for Scottish Labour
headings: h2: “However you voted at the election, I'm here to serve you.”
h3: Help deliver the work of change
h2: “To me, an MP’s job isn’t just in Westminster. I'm doing politics differently as an active, local champion, putting all the communities of Livingston constituency first.”
h3: Delivering change for the Livingston constituency.
homepage.text_excerpt: Gregor Poynton for Scottish Labour 0 Skip to Content Get involved Donate Open Menu Close Menu Get involved Donate Open Menu Close Menu Get involved Donate “However you voted at the election, I'm here to serve you.” Sign up Sign up Help deliver the work of change It's my job now to deliver the change you've voted for, and I've got straight to work. If you, your family and your community need help or would like to discuss an issue please get in touch on gregor.poynton.mp @parliament.uk. Change is here. So let's get started. Sign up to get involved. First Name Last Name Email Address Sign Up Thank you! “To me, an MP’s job isn’t just in Westminster. I'm doing politics differently as an active, local champion, putting all the communities of Livingston constituency first.” Delivering change for the Livingston constituency. People right across Livingston constituency are hopeful for the future. They're right to be. It's a wonderful place to live and bring up a family. They now have an MP and government that's on their side. With a government that is focussed on what matters to you and your family: properly funding our NHS and schools, building an economy that works for working people, getting police back on our streets, and helping families with the cost-of-living crisis. I will stand up for local people, be an MP who works tirelessly to make sure everyone, no matter their background, can thrive. Take action Take action Privacy statement Promoted by Graeme Morrice on behalf of Gregor Poynton, both at 14 King's Well Crescent, Broxburn EH52 5FB. Get in touch: Email - gregor.poynton.mp@parliament.uk Twitter - @gregorpoynton Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/GregorPoyntonLabour Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/gregorpoynton
